description_long: This is a rectangular, robust storage box constructed from dark-stained wood, featuring a solid and heavy appearance. The box has a recessed panel design on its sides and ends, adding a touch of visual depth and structural reinforcement. The top surface is flat with subtle indented sections, possibly for stacking or grip, and the wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural, slightly glossy finish. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, suggesting the lid may be removable or simply a flat cover. The bottom corners are reinforced with small, round metal feet or protectors, indicating durability and stability when placed on the ground. The overall design is utilitarian yet refined, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban outdoor settings.
description: A dark wooden rectangular storage box with recessed panels, a flat top, and metal-reinforced bottom corners, exuding a sturdy and utilitarian look.
description_view_0: End view showing a recessed square panel and the flat, glossy wood surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three vertical recessed panels and the uninterrupted wood grain.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, identical to view 0, with a recessed square panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, with three vertical recessed panels and visible metal feet at the corners.
